name: Meadow
description: Tufts of grass leaning in the wind, a wildflower blinking open here and there — every redraw sends a new gust through the field.

code.style: --flower: @p(var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* the three blades share one emitted ink and height so the tuft stays rooted */ --blade: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --bh: @r(42, 74); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 47%; width: 5%; top: calc(100% - @var(--bh) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--bh) * 1%); border-radius: 99px 99px 0 0; background: @var(--blade); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transform: rotate(@rand(-16deg, 16deg)); box-shadow: calc(-140px / @Y) calc(30px / @Y) @var(--blade), calc(140px / @Y) calc(30px / @Y) @var(--blade); transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.2) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 13%; left: @rand(24%, 64%); top: @rand(10%, 34%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--flower); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
